content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "This is the reference Joe transcript itself, and the methodology fidelity is exemplary. The coach deploys signature questions verbatim ('what's the real question?' T2; 'what's the emotion you're scared to feel?' T6; 'what's the fear that... what does your mind tell you as the reason not to?' T22) at precisely the moments they fit. Framework concepts are invoked when live: joy-as-matriarch (T4) named exactly when the client reports anhedonia; freeze named somatically (T10) the moment the system shows it; calibrate-the-threshold ('I'm not going to ask you to feel it, just name it... give me the sound' T8) when the client says 'I don't know'; paradoxical-instruction-to-resist ('become even more blank' T12) honoring rather than fighting the dissociation. The closing both/and reframe (T30) holds the blank space AND the tears without collapsing one into the other. No anti-AoA frames, no CBT reframing, no pop-psych vocabulary, no loving-to-transform. Every methodology hit is appropriate to its moment.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 22, 26, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what's the real question?' bypasses intellectual framing."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Joy-as-matriarch concept invoked verbatim at the exact moment client reports loss of pleasure; also validates compartmentalization as wisdom."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what are you scared of feeling?' deployed appropriately."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Calibrate-the-threshold move: lowers ask from feel to name to sound when client says 'I don't know.'"},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the somatic state 'does this feel like freeze?' — fear-in-body distinction."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical-instruction-to-resist: 'become even more blank.' Master AoA move honoring survival strategy."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings body in without leaving the quiet place — both/and structure."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine safety inquiry without breaking presence or shifting to clinical mode."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what's the fear?' question deployed when client moves toward the feeling."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-disclosure to normalize, then immediately returns to body: 'what happened when I said that?' — treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion territory."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closing reframe: blank space AND tears coexist. Feel-your-way-to-freedom embodied."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "calibrate-the-threshold", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "joy-as-matriarch", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "what-are-you-scared-of-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reference Joe transcript; methodology deployment is the gold standard."
}
